title: double note-selection in send_payment: invariant not machine-verifiable
description: payment.rs calls select_with_fee twice: once explicitly to get selected_ids for post-broadcast marking, then a second time implicitly inside build_shielded_tx. The comment documents that both calls must receive identical (all_notes, amount_zatoshi) or selected_ids will diverge and the wrong notes get marked spent. There is no runtime assertion enforcing this. A contributor who refactors to pass pre-selected notes to build_shielded_tx (reasonable optimization) will silently break note marking — no compile error, no test failure, the bug only surfaces when the node rejects a double-spend. Add a debug_assert comparing selected_ids to the IDs actually used in the built tx, or restructure so selection happens once.
